highlights.text: I wrote Friday at 4pm: “My general lean is always just to defer to the trend.
I wrote yesterday: “Bear case tomorrow: Begins below 6699.” We lost 6699, and sold 20 points rapidly.
Remember that institutions buy dips via my core setup: The Failed Breakdown.

Does the dip have more in the tank?In today’s newsletter I’ll discuss this, I’ll run down multiple quality setups we’ve had in the last week and we’ve seen just in the past few days Failed Breakdowns, Failed Breakdown Re-Tests, and Level Reclaims, three variants of my core setup.

post_title: A Rare Two Days In A Row For SPX - First In A Month. Will SPX Do 3? Sept 25 Plan
